SEARCH
Package knowledge_keepers

Class KnowledgeKeepers

java.lang.Object
knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Direct Known Subclasses:
Professor, SL, TA
public abstract class KnowledgeKeepers extends Object
Abstract class representing Knowledge Keepers in the game, such as SLs, TAs, and Professors.

Maintains static lists of all instances by their actual types and provides common properties like name, image, position, assigned questions and information, and timers for movement and attacks.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Ahmet Buğra Ertürk

  • Field Details

    • hasQuestion

      public boolean hasQuestion

    • hasInfo

      public boolean hasInfo

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public void draw(Image keeperImage, Graphics g)
      Draws the image on the GameGUI
      Parameters:
      keeperImage - the body image of the keepers
      g - the Graphics object

    • attackQuestion

      public void attackQuestion()
      Attacks by shooting a question if there is no active question on the current game GUI. Selects a random question and starts its movement from the current X position.

    • attackInfo

      public void attackInfo()
      Attacks by shooting information if there is no active information on the current game GUI. Selects a random information and starts its movement from the current X position.

    • getSLs

      public static List<KnowledgeKeepers> getSLs()
      Returns the list of all SL instances.
      Returns:
      list of SLs

    • getTAs

      public static List<KnowledgeKeepers> getTAs()
      Returns the list of all TA instances.
      Returns:
      list of TAs

    • getProfessors

      public static List<KnowledgeKeepers> getProfessors()
      Returns the list of all Professor instances.
      Returns:
      list of Professors

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this KnowledgeKeeper.
      Returns:
      the name

    • getCoordinate

      public int[] getCoordinate()
      Returns the X coordinates of the body and the head images. The first element is the body image X coordinate, the second element is the head image X coordinate.
      Returns:
      an int array containing {bodyX, headX}

    • getInfo

      public Informations getInfo()
      Returns the current Informations object assigned to this KnowledgeKeeper.
      Returns:
      the Informations object

    • getQuest

      public Questions getQuest()
      Returns the current Questions object assigned to this KnowledgeKeeper.
      Returns:
      the Questions object

    • setInfo

      public void setInfo(Informations info)
      Sets the Informations object for this KnowledgeKeeper.
      Parameters:
      info - the Informations object to set

    • setQuest

      public void setQuest(Questions quest)
      Sets the Questions object for this KnowledgeKeeper.
      Parameters:
      quest - the Questions object to set

    • setPlayerX

      public void setPlayerX(int playerX)
      Sets the player's X coordinate.
      Parameters:
      playerX - the player's X coordinate to set

    • resetTimers

      public void resetTimers()
      Stops all timers related to movement and attacks, and clears any active Informations and Questions.

    • move

      public abstract void move()
      Moves the KnowledgeKeeper.

    • movementDirection

      public abstract void movementDirection()
      Updates the movement direction of the KnowledgeKeeper.

    • startAttack

      public abstract void startAttack()
      Starts attack action.
